summary_of_findings: The risk assessment for XTELIFY LIMITED shows high overall risk, notable government relationship extent linked with critical political connection risks potentially complicating government contracting. The assessment results call for specialized monitoring and comprehensive risk reporting.

adv_data.kpi_details:
Name: XTELIFY LIMITED
Rating: 4.3
Number of Reviews: 2060


Reviews:
	1. Name: Lakshay Nagpal | Rating: 5
Large Lively Office with soothing music of fountain water falling on ground. Really neat and clean office. Staff very polite and cooperative. Subway, easyday and whatnot are already there in their cafeteria.

	2. Name: Sandeep K | Rating: 5
A wonderful office at Gurgaon where all the Airtel subsidiary companies are located. Very spacious office with a lot of coffee points, a lot is space for fresh air. Also a lot of conference & meeting halls

	3. Name: Shikha Yadav | Rating: 1
On 7th Aug, I made the mistake of trusting Airtel for WiFi. Same day, I got a call from one “mahaan aurat” from their side — maybe customer service, maybe sales, but definitely an expert in ego management.

She promised, “We’ll try today, otherwise tomorrow morning for sure.” I kept explaining how urgent it was — my whole family’s work-from-home was on hold. Even a late-night installation was fine for me. But this mahaan aurat clearly decided that since I wasn’t blindly agreeing to her every word, she would simply cut the call in the middle of the conversation.

Just like that. No care, no patience — only ego satisfaction.

Now it’s 9th Aug — 3 days later — Airtel has my money, I still have no WiFi, no update. But I’m sure the mahaan aurat is sleeping peacefully, proud of the fact that she delayed a customer’s work just to protect her own ego.

If Airtel’s priority is to hire such mahaan people instead of delivering service, then congratulations — mission accomplished.

Case details for Airtel to identify (if it matters) :
•Registered under: Deependra Yadav
•Registered mobile no. ending: 4032 / 1141
•	Request date: 07 Aug 2025
•	Location: Sector 102, Gurgaon
•	Connection type: Airtel Xstream Fiber
Lead id - 21-131742280915
Order date- 07/08/2025

	4. Name: Kartik Misra | Rating: 1
Been trying to get a sim card replacement for my father who is unwell and bed ridden.. and cannot come to the store. Have even shared his medical documents, Airtel has no exception to cater for this for a home visit to issue a sim card. I am even ready to pay for the inconvenience.

But in the land where we can get 10min delivery.. I have been following for 45 days with Airtel, and still no resolution after promises.

	5. Name: Ankit kumar Sharma | Rating: 5
Very very nice in dor aria
